note: Views Slideshow is an API module: a `slideshow` Views style plus four plugin types (slideshow type, widget, widget type, skin), with no global config form — everything is per View display. It needs an engine submodule (views_slideshow_cycle) to animate. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to display the rows of a View as a rotating slideshow. Which module and which Views display format do I use, and is there a global admin settings page to configure it?
evals.expected_output: Enable views_slideshow, set the display Format to 'Slideshow' (the `slideshow` Views style). There is no global settings form — configuration is per View display under Format settings.

evals.prompt: I enabled Views Slideshow and chose the Slideshow format but the settings form says no slideshow plugin is enabled / nothing animates. What else do I need to enable?
evals.expected_output: Views Slideshow is only an API; you must enable an engine that provides a slideshow type — the bundled views_slideshow_cycle (jQuery Cycle) submodule, or another implementation.

evals.prompt: What plugin types does the views_slideshow module define for extending slideshows on Drupal 11?
evals.expected_output: Four types: ViewsSlideshowType (engine), ViewsSlideshowWidget, ViewsSlideshowWidgetType, and ViewsSlideshowSkin — each discovered from src/Plugin/<TypeName> with a matching annotation and plugin manager.

evals.prompt: I want to integrate a different JavaScript slider library as a Views Slideshow engine. Which plugin type do I implement and where does the class go?
evals.expected_output: Implement a ViewsSlideshowType plugin (annotation @ViewsSlideshowType, extends ViewsSlideshowTypeBase) in src/Plugin/ViewsSlideshowType/; declare accepts/calls actions. The cycle submodule's Cycle plugin is the reference.

evals.prompt: How do I add previous/next controls, a pager and a slide counter to a Views Slideshow, and where do they appear?
evals.expected_output: In the style's Widgets section enable the widget types (controls/pager/counter) per location (top and/or bottom) with a weight; bundled widgets include views_slideshow_controls_text, views_slideshow_pager_bullets, views_slideshow_pager_fields.

evals.prompt: In an exported Views Slideshow display, which style option keys select the skin and the slideshow engine, and what are their defaults?
evals.expected_output: slideshow_skin (default 'default') selects the skin; slideshow_type (default 'views_slideshow_cycle') selects the engine — both in the views.style.slideshow options.

evals.prompt: From a custom module I want to alter the registered Views Slideshow type definitions. Which alter hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_views_slideshow_type_info() (the type manager's alterInfo); parallel hooks exist for widget, widget type, and skin registries.

evals.prompt: Which template overrides the overall Views Slideshow output, and where do the pager/controls/counter templates live?
evals.expected_output: The style renders via theme hook views_view_slideshow (views-view-slideshow.html.twig); copy the module's templates/ files (main-section, pager-*, controls-text*, slide-counter*) into your theme to override.
